gt_sql: SELECT T1.name FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T2.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T2.fastestLapTime ASC LIMIT 1
pred_sql: SELECT r.name FROM results res JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId WHERE res.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CAST(res.fastestLapTime AS INTEGER) LIMIT 1;
question: In terms of the fastest lap time, what is the name of the race which recorded the fastest lap speed by a racer?
